asi.jest_config: react-native preset, babel-jest, no cache, node env

description: Add transformIgnorePatterns to skip transforming most node_modules (was transforming everything)

asi.hypothesis: transformIgnorePatterns:[] was forcing babel to transform ALL node_modules files; restricting to only needed packages saves ~5s
asi.key_insight: The empty transformIgnorePatterns array was the single biggest perf problem

description: Test-only babel config with single @react-native/babel-preset (removing redundant preset-env + preset-typescript)

asi.hypothesis: Removing redundant babel presets would speed up transforms
asi.rollback_reason: No improvement - within noise of previous 9.46s
asi.next_action_hint: Try maxWorkers tuning, or look at specific slow tests like plugin.test.ts
